name: nomarr
author: Nomarr
description: Nomarr ML-powered audio similarity for Instant Mix

http.reason: To query Nomarr API for ML-powered audio similarity results

nomarr_url.title: Nomarr API URL
nomarr_url.description: Base URL of your Nomarr instance (e.g. http://nomarr:8356)

nomarr_api_key.title: Nomarr API Key
nomarr_api_key.description: API key for authenticating with Nomarr

backbone_id.title: ML Backbone
backbone_id.description: ML backbone model to use for similarity. Default: effnet-discogs
